---
title: "dialogue.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\scripts\engine\dialogue.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.65
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 4.72
---

## Intent
The `dialogue.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on DialogueRetriever, __init__, _read_with_fallback, _load, get, __repr__. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via DialogueRetriever, __init__, _read_with_fallback, _load, get, __repr__. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [random](file://random)

### Exports
- `DialogueRetriever`
- `__init__`
- `_read_with_fallback`
- `_load`
- `get`
- `__repr__`
